authors.author: Melody Green
Melody Green
Er ist der Erlöser (Danke, lieber Vater)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a redeemer Jesus, God's own Son Precious Lamb of God, Messiah Holy One

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Thank you, oh my father For giving us Your Son And leaving Your Spirit Till the work on Earth is done

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus my redeemer Name above all names Precious Lamb of God, Messiah Oh, for sinners slain

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I stand in Glory I will see His face There I'll serve my King forever In that Holy Place
